title: Uang Panai' 2 Maha(r)l
overview: Ancha and Risna's romantic relationship, which Tumming and Abu managed to match up to the point of marriage. This time, two hilarious friends, together with Ancha, opened a business that focuses on finding a soul mate who has problems finding dowry money or panai money. The business founded by Tumming and Abu is entitled PATTUMBU which stands for Ancha Tumming and Abu Company which opened the First Panai Money Consultation Service.  Will the business run by Ancha, Tumming and Abu run smoothly?
